clean_title: Neural Network Classifier for Boolean Functions
explanation: The code defines a neural network using a basic perceptron and an adaline model. It initializes training sets for various boolean functions (AND, OR, IMPLIES, XOR) and processes them through these models to adjust weights based on their performance in classification tasks. The program also includes functionality to simulate noise in the input data, assessing how resilient the models are against erroneous information. Additionally, it demonstrates the training and testing of the models across multiple examples and prints the results.
name: 2007-05-07_cccc
subject: cccc
summary: This project implements a simple perceptron and adaline neural network models to classify boolean functions and evaluate their learning performance.
